channel.title: Papers on Chaeeun Han
channel.description: Recent content in Papers on Chaeeun Han

item.title: An Online Approach to Solving Public Transit Stationing and Dispatch Problem
item.description: This paper shows the bus dispatch model using Monte Carlo Tree Search. Published in Conference ICCPS 2024

item.title: Forecasting and Mitigating Disruptions in Public Bus Transit Services
item.description: This paper shows the disruptions forecasting model and bus-dispatch simulation according to them. Published in Conference AAMAS 2024 (Acceptance rate: 25%)

item.title: A Framework for Perception Analysis of Social Media Data During Disease Outbreaks: Uncovering Patterns of Resentment Towards Bats.
item.description: This paper shows a domain-specific machine learning framework for analyzing social media data. Published in HICSS57.

item.title: A study on the development and evaluation of personalized book recommendation systems in university libraries based on individual loan records
item.description: This paper shows how a book recommendation system in university library can be personalized using machine learning models. Published in Journal of the Korean Society for information Management, 2021.

item.title: Embedding-based neural network models for book recommendation in university libraries
item.description: This paper shows personalized recommendation system in university libraries. Published in Workshop on AI + Informetrics, AII 2021.
